pages.text: $(bold)Exporters$() are output gates placed inside CM dimensions.$(br2)They actively pull items from adjacent machines and send them to PreFab PUSH faces.$(br2)Think of them as: $(italic)"Where resources from your factory exit to the Overworld"$()

pages.title: How Exporters Work
pages.text: $(bold)1.$() Exporter actively pulls from adjacent machines (every tick)$(br2)$(bold)2.$() Stores items in internal buffer$(br2)$(bold)3.$() PreFab extracts from buffer and pushes to Overworld$(br2)Works with machines that don't push (like furnaces).

pages.title: Placing Exporters
pages.text: $(bold)Direct connection:$()$(br)[Machine] → [Exporter]$(br2)$(bold)Better: Use a chest$(br)[Machine] → [Chest] → [Exporter]$(br2)$(italic)Intermediate chests create more reliable, better-behaved systems.$()

pages.title: Active Pulling
pages.text: Unlike Importers (passive), Exporters are $(bold)active$():$(br2)Every tick, they check all 6 adjacent sides and pull items from any machine with available output.$(br2)9-slot buffer allows for timing differences.
